description: Create a 'St Helens Anchorage' scenario in Bridge Command to simulate an anchor dragging incident during a gale at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/s) St Helens Anchor Drag/'. Configure the environment for the Solent at night (between 22:00 and 04:00) with gale-force winds (35-45 knots) from the South-West (225 degrees). Position the ownship 'VTS Patrol' near St Helens Anchorage (Lat ~50.70-50.73, Long ~ -1.05 to -1.00). Include four other vessels: three large anchored vessels (Tanker/Bulk Carrier) with zero speed, and one dragging vessel named 'MV Slippy' drifting Northeast (~045 degrees) at 0.5 to 1.5 knots using a waypoint leg. Create an instructor briefing identifying the dragging vessel at /home/ga/Documents/instructor_briefing.txt.
